text:
Created attachment 221625
patch to 3.6.2 using diff -Nur

proposed patch using diff, works with patch -p0 from /usr/ports

now SBCL instead of CCL,
new maintainer (me, was none),
no wrapper anymore necessary

portlint: ok
make install, deinstall, reinstall, package: ok

thx
